incorrect.source_says: R-spondin 1 is supplied as conditioned medium from 293T cells (20% of total volume) in expansion medium, and as 500 ng/ml recombinant human R-spondin 1 in differentiation medium. It is never 500 nM. The value 500 nM belongs to the small molecule A83-01.
incorrect.evidence_quote: 500 nM A83-01 (2939, Tocris) ... and conditioned medium from the L cell line secreting Wnt3A (50% of total volume) and 293T cells secreting R-spondin 1 (20%)

incorrect.source_says: The extraction's own evidence quote for R-spondin 1 is verbatim the A83-01 entry ('500 nM A83-01'), confirming the concentration/quote was cross-wired from the A83-01 small molecule onto R-spondin 1.

incorrect.extracted: fetal bovine serum (as an organoid media supplement)
incorrect.source_says: FBS is used in the cancer cell-line growth media (RPMI/EMEM for SW480, HCT116, Caco-2) and to wash the crypt pellet during isolation. It is NOT a component of the organoid expansion or differentiation media. Listing it under the organoid (adult_stem_cell) protocol is cross-protocol contamination from the cell-line section.
incorrect.evidence_quote: SW480 and HCT116 cells were grown in RPMI medium ... supplemented with 10% fetal bovine serum ... Crypt pellet was washed with FBS
incorrect.source_loc: methods_text / Cell lines + Human intestinal organoids (crypt isolation)

incorrect.source_says: The organoid expansion and differentiation media are explicitly based on advanced DMEM F12 (Gibco 12634010), 26% of total volume in expansion medium. Base media is clearly reported.
incorrect.evidence_quote: Organoid expansion media [based on (76,77)] consisted of advanced DMEM F12 (12634010, Gibco) (26% of total volume)

recall_misses.item: Small molecule A83-01 (500 nM, Tocris 2939) - TGF-beta/ALK inhibitor in expansion medium
recall_misses.source_says: A83-01 at 500 nM is an expansion-medium component; small_molecules array is empty and the value was instead mis-assigned to R-spondin 1.

recall_misses.item: Small molecule SB202190 (10 uM, Tocris 1264) - p38 inhibitor in expansion medium
recall_misses.source_says: Listed expansion-medium component; entirely absent from extraction (small_molecules empty).

recall_misses.item: Nicotinamide (10 mM, Sigma N0636) in expansion medium
recall_misses.source_says: Listed expansion-medium component; absent from both media_supplements and small_molecules.

recall_misses.item: Y-27632 ROCK inhibitor (10 uM, Sigma Y0503) added to expansion medium for first 2 days
recall_misses.source_says: Listed small molecule used during initial seeding and 2D monolayer seeding; absent from small_molecules array.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 10 μM Y-27632 (Rock inhibitor, Y0503, Sigma-Aldrich) was added to expansion medium for the first 2 days

recall_misses.item: R-spondin 1 differentiation-medium concentration (500 ng/ml recombinant human, Peprotech 120-38)
recall_misses.source_says: Differentiation medium uses 500 ng/ml recombinant human R-spondin 1; extraction captured no correct R-spondin concentration for either medium.

recall_misses.item: Wnt3A concentration (50% of total volume, L-cell conditioned medium)
recall_misses.source_says: Wnt3A was extracted but with null concentration; source states it is conditioned medium at 50% of total volume.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: conditioned medium from the L cell line secreting Wnt3A (50% of total volume)

recall_misses.source_says: culture_conditions marked not_extracted; source explicitly states 37C and 5% CO2 for organoid (Matrigel dome) incubation.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: incubated upside down for 20 min in a 37°C 5% CO2 incubator until the Matrigel solidifies

recall_misses.item: Matrigel matrix detail (15 ul domes on 12-well plates; Corning FAL356231)
recall_misses.source_says: Matrix name correct (Matrigel) but percent/format null; source gives 15 ul dome seeding and 1:50 Matrigel coating for 2D monolayers.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: resuspended in ice-cold Matrigel (FAL356231, Corning) and seeded as 15 µl domes on pre-warmed 12-wells tissue culture plates

recall_misses.item: Passaging / single-cell dissociation method (Recombinant Trypsin EDTA, mechanical disruption)
recall_misses.source_says: passaging marked not_reported; source describes dissociation of 3D organoids to single cells via recombinant trypsin-EDTA and mechanical disruption (for 2D seeding).
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 3D organoids were resuspended with Recombinant Trypsin EDTA Solution (03-079-1A, Biological Industries) and mechanically disrupted into a single cell suspension

recall_misses.source_says: Feeding interval reported but not captured (passaging.interval/timeline empty).
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Medium was changed every other day

recall_misses.item: Source tissue: ileal and colonic crypts from human surgical bowel-resection specimens (some Crohn's / ulcerative colitis)
recall_misses.source_says: source_cells.evidence is null; organoids derive from primary ileal/colonic crypts of surgical specimens, including IBD patients.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Human ileal and colonic crypts were isolated and organoids were cultured as previously described

notes: Text-only adjudication; no data/figures/local/PMC10030769/ directory exists, so multimodal=false. The single table (Table 1) is an immunofluorescence antibody list with no media composition. organoid_type (intestinal), matrix (Matrigel), source species/cell_type (human adult stem cell from crypts), Noggin (100 ng/ml), human EGF (50 ng/ml), Prostaglandine E2 (10 nM), and the Pen/Strep/HEPES/GlutaMAX/B27/NAC/Primocin supplement names are all correctly extracted and verbatim-supported. Two genuine correctness errors: (1) a cross-wired fabrication where A83-01's '500 nM' value AND its evidence quote were mis-assigned to R-spondin 1 (whose true concentrations are 20% conditioned medium / 500 ng/ml); (2) cross-protocol contamination listing FBS as an organoid supplement when FBS belongs only to the cancer cell-line media and crypt-wash steps. Significant recall gaps: all four small molecules (A83-01, SB202190, Nicotinamide, Y-27632) missing; base_media (advanced DMEM F12), culture_conditions (37C/5% CO2), passaging/dissociation, and feeding interval all unextracted despite being explicitly stated. No ESC->iPSC mislabel (this is an adult-stem-cell primary organoid, correctly labeled).
